roa.docketEntryComment: MOTION TO SET ASIDE THE INFORMATION UNDER 995--FILED

/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON: DA'S OFFICE DID NOT PROVIDE  A INCIDENT REPORT AND PTD WAS UNABLE TO DETERMINE RESTITUTION, COURTRULING: DEFENDANT HAS NO OBLIGATION RE RESTITUTION, PROBATION CONTIUNES /

/CAL JURY TRIAL/AMEND TO ADD COUNTS 3-242 PC AND 4-242 PC A MISDEMEANOR//X:DEFENDANT WIA AND WAIVED ALL THE IRREGULARITIES CONNECTED WITH THE AMENDMENT,/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PER WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:3,4/DISM3/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/TWS/CH3:ISS:CPROB:PROB 3 Y:PJ105D/CTS:105/CS1:COUNTS 3 AND 4/CCPV/WS/SA1:MICHAEL HENDERSON/SAORD/WEAP/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO PAY RESTITUTION TO THE VICTIM TO BE DETERMINED BY PTD/CONTD:PROGRESS REPORT ON RESTITUION FROM PTD//X:IF DEFT IN CUSTODY, APPEARANCE WAIVED ON 07-15-05, IF NOT IN CUSTODY APPEARANCE REQUIRED ON THE SUBSEQUENT COURT DATES,/ /SECFEE/VF1/OBEY/ACCEP/
/CAL:PC 995 MOTION TO SET ASIDE THE INFORMATION/ARG&SUB/MO GRTD/GRTD:AS TO COUNT(S)1 GBI ALLEGATIONS/CTORD: CASE PRETRIED AND TRIAL DATE CONFIRMED/
/TEXT:TRANS TO DEPT 25//TRANS 25:FORTHWITH FOR PRETRIAL CONF & HEARING 995PC MOTION/LD:06-27-05/
/TEXT:DEFT IS ORDERED HELD TO ANSWER/HOLDING/WIT SWORN:MICHAEL HENDERSON//HTA1:1/X:MISDEMEANOR CERTIFIED/BAIL:100,000/DEFTCUST3/SHERCOM1/
